28 ArcGeoSimPostProcessingBase::
29 ArcGeoSimPostProcessingBase(ISubDomain* sd, const String name)
30  : m_sub_domain(sd)
31  , m_has_post_processing(false)
32  , m_times(VariableBuildInfo(sd, String::format("{0}ExportTimes",name)))
33  , m_output_dir_created(false)
34  , m_name(name)
35 {
36 // m_post_processing_timer = new Timer(sd,String::format("{0}PostProcessorTimer",name),Timer::TimerReal);
37 }
38

49 void
50 ArcGeoSimPostProcessingBase::
51 init(Arcane::String output_path)
52 {
53  m_output_path = output_path;
54 }

56 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/

58 void
59 ArcGeoSimPostProcessingBase::
60 saveAtTime(Real saved_time)
61 {
62  _saveVariablesAtTime(saved_time, m_pp_variables);
63 }
64 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
65 
66 void
67 ArcGeoSimPostProcessingBase::
68 saveAtInitialTime(Real saved_time)
69 {
70  _saveVariablesAtTime(saved_time, m_pp_init_variables);
71 }
72 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
73 
74 void
75 ArcGeoSimPostProcessingBase::
76 _saveVariablesAtTime(Real saved_time, const Arcane::Array<Arcane::VariableList>& pp_variables)
77 {
78  if (!m_has_post_processing) return;
79 
80  Integer size = m_times.size();
81 
82  IVariableMng* vm = m_sub_domain->variableMng();
83  ITraceMng * traceMng = m_sub_domain->traceMng();
84 
85  // Ne sauvegarde pas si le temps actuel est le m���������me que le pr���������c���������dent
86  // (Sinon ca fait planter Ensight...)
87 //#ifndef NO_USER_WARNING
88 //#ifndef WIN32
89 //#warning "BUG: ceci doit ���������tre un bug de post-processing suite ��������� une annulation de pas de temps"
90 //#endif
91 //#endif
92  if (size!=0 && Arcane::math::isEqual(m_times[size-1],saved_time))
93  return;
94 
95  m_times.resize(size+1);
96  m_times[size] = saved_time;
97 
98  _checkCreateOutputDir();
99 
100  if (true /*m_do_output*/)
101  {
102  traceMng->info() << " ";
103  traceMng->info() << "**** Sortie en cours au temps " << saved_time <<" ******";
104 
105  // M���������morisation des ���������tats used et mise ��������� jour ���������ventuelle
106  BoolSharedArray usedStates;
107  for(Integer i=0;i<pp_variables.size();++i)
108  for(VariableList::Enumerator j(pp_variables[i]); ++j; )
109  {
110  IVariable * var = *j;
111  usedStates.add(var->isUsed());
112  var->setUsed(true);
113  if (var->computeFunction())
114  {
115  // var->update();
116 //#ifndef NO_USER_WARNING
117 //#ifndef WIN32
118 //#warning "TODO: Fixer cet appel brutal du foncteur"
119 //#endif
120 //#endif
121  var->computeFunction()->execute();
122  }
123  }
124 
125  for(Integer ip=0,np=m_pp_writer.size();ip<np;++ip)
126  {
127  IPostProcessorWriter* writer = m_pp_writer[ip];
128 # ifndef USE_ARCANE_V3
129  writer->setMesh(m_pp_meshes[ip]);
130 #else
131  // The mesh is set in the writer
132  // todo check mesh in the writer is the same as the one given here
133  // -> waiting for a method IPostProcessorWriter::mesh() or equivalent
134 #endif
135  writer->setBaseDirectoryName(m_pp_base_directory_names[ip]);
136  writer->setTimes(m_times);
137  writer->setVariables(pp_variables[ip]);
138  writer->setGroups(m_pp_groups[ip]);
139  {
140  Timer::Sentry ts(&m_pp_timer[ip]);
141  vm->writePostProcessing(writer);
142  }
143  }
144 
145  // Restoration des flags used
146  for(Integer i=0, index=0;i<pp_variables.size();++i)
147  for(VariableList::Enumerator j(pp_variables[i]); ++j; ++index)
148  (*j)->setUsed(usedStates[index]);
149  }
150 }
151 
152 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
153 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
154 
155 void
156 ArcGeoSimPostProcessingBase::
157 _checkCreateOutputDir()
158 {
159  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_has_post_processing),("Illegal call when post-processing is not configured"));
160  if (m_output_dir_created)
161  return;
162  m_output_directory = Directory(m_output_path);
163  m_output_directory.createDirectory();
164  m_output_directory = Directory(m_output_directory,"depouillement");
165  m_output_directory.createDirectory();
166  m_output_dir_created = true;
167  for (Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < m_pp_meshes.size();++i)
168  {
169  if (m_pp_meshes[i]->name() != m_sub_domain->defaultMesh()->name())
170  {
171  Directory sub_dir(m_output_directory,Arcane::String::format("depouillement_{0}",m_pp_meshes[i]->name()));
172  sub_dir.createDirectory();
173  m_pp_base_directory_names.add(sub_dir.path());
174  }
175  else m_pp_base_directory_names.add(m_output_directory.path());
176  }
177 }
178 
179 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
180 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
181 
182 void
183 ArcGeoSimPostProcessingBase::
184 stats()
185 {
186  if (!m_has_post_processing) return;
187 
188  ITraceMng * traceMng = m_sub_domain->traceMng();
189 
190  for(int i=0;i<m_pp_timer.size();++i)
191  {
192  Real total_time = m_pp_timer[i].totalTime();
193  traceMng->info() << "Temps total pour les sorties de dépouillement "<< m_pp_timer[i].name() << " (seconde): " << total_time;
194  Integer nb_time = m_pp_timer[i].nbActivated();
195  if (nb_time!=0)
196  traceMng->info() << "Temps moyen par sortie (seconde): " << total_time / nb_time
197  << " (pour " << nb_time << " sorties)";
198  }
199 }
200 
201 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
202 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
203 void
204 ArcGeoSimPostProcessingBase::
205 _addPostProcessingMesh(const Arcane::String& mesh_name)
206 {
207  if (mesh_name == m_default_mesh_name) m_pp_meshes.add(m_sub_domain->defaultMesh());
208  else
209  {
210  bool throw_exception = true;
211  m_pp_meshes.add(m_sub_domain->findMesh(mesh_name,throw_exception));
212  }
213 }
214
